tasks.subject: Task 1: Bootstrap worktree + establish green baseline
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Get the fresh worktree runnable and capture the pre-change baseline of automated checks.

**Files:**
- Create: `.env` (gitignored — not committed). No source changes; no commit.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `CI=true pnpm install` completes; Prisma client generated.
- [ ] `.env` with `AUTH_SECRET` 32+ chars + `BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000`.
- [ ] `pnpm db:deploy` clean.
- [ ] `pnpm build` ok; `pnpm start -p 3000` boots; /login 200.
- [ ] Baseline `CI=true pnpm test:unit`, `pnpm lint`, `npx tsc --noEmit` green (counts noted).

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit`

```json:metadata
{"files": [".env"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["install + generate ok", ".env 32+ char AUTH_SECRET + BASE_URL", "db:deploy clean", "build ok + /login 200", "baseline green, counts noted"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Capture screenshots + author scored 6-pillar review doc
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Produce `docs/superpowers/2026-06-10-quorum-ai-ui-review.md` — fresh scored 6-pillar audit of the whole app incl. M3-M5 surface, findings tagged [severity]+file:line, triaged objective/subjective.

**Files:**
- Create (temp, deleted before commit): `tests/e2e/_screenshots.spec.ts`
- Create: `docs/superpowers/2026-06-10-quorum-ai-ui-review.md`
- Reference: `docs/superpowers/2026-06-06-quorum-ai-ui-review.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All surfaces shot light+dark × 1280+390.
- [ ] M3-M5 multi-user surfaces via TWO contexts (mirror presence/selections specs).
- [ ] 6 pillars scored /24 in 2026-06-06 format.
- [ ] Each finding: [severity] + file:line + (objective)/(subjective).
- [ ] Temp spec removed; shots not committed.

**Verify:** review doc has `## Score summary` (6 pillars); temp spec gone.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/2026-06-10-quorum-ai-ui-review.md", "tests/e2e/_screenshots.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "test -f docs/superpowers/2026-06-10-quorum-ai-ui-review.md && ! test -f tests/e2e/_screenshots.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all surfaces light+dark × 1280+390", "M3-M5 via two contexts", "6 pillars scored /24", "findings: severity+file:line+obj/subj", "temp spec removed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Subjective-decisions checkpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Resolve every (subjective) finding with the user via one question; record decisions in the review doc.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/superpowers/2026-06-10-quorum-ai-ui-review.md` (add `## Subjective decisions (resolved)`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Every (subjective) finding presented as an option (recommended noted).
- [ ] Decisions recorded with rationale.
- [ ] No code changes.

**Verify:** doc contains `## Subjective decisions (resolved)`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/2026-06-10-quorum-ai-ui-review.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -q 'Subjective decisions (resolved)' docs/superpowers/2026-06-10-quorum-ai-ui-review.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["subjective findings presented", "decisions recorded w/ rationale", "no code changes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Fix objective findings — critical + high
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Resolve every (objective) [critical]/[high] finding within the token system, re-verifying visually.

**Files:** data-driven by review doc — only files named in findings (likely app/globals.css, components/ui/*, components/DocumentView.tsx, CommentSidebar.tsx, SessionBanner.tsx, PresenceRoster.tsx, PresenceCursors.tsx, VersionHistory.tsx, WebhookManager.tsx, TokenManager.tsx, app/page.tsx, app/login/page.tsx, app/register/page.tsx).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All critical/high objective findings resolved.
- [ ] Tokens-only, no raw hex, no new scale.
- [ ] No data-testid/aria-label/button-name changed.
- [ ] test:unit + lint + tsc green.
- [ ] Affected surfaces re-screenshotted both themes/widths.

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit`; re-shot PNGs resolved.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/globals.css", "components/ui", "components/DocumentView.tsx", "components/CommentSidebar.tsx", "components/SessionBanner.tsx", "components/PresenceRoster.tsx", "components/PresenceCursors.tsx", "components/VersionHistory.tsx", "components/WebhookManager.tsx", "components/TokenManager.tsx", "app/page.tsx", "app/login/page.tsx", "app/register/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all critical/high objective resolved", "tokens-only no raw hex", "no test-hook changes", "unit/lint/tsc green", "affected surfaces re-shot"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Fix objective findings — medium + low — and chosen subjective fixes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Resolve every (objective) [medium]/[low] finding plus Task-3-approved subjective fixes, within the token system.

**Files:** data-driven by review doc + Task 3 decisions; same candidate set as Task 4.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All medium/low objective findings resolved.
- [ ] Approved subjective fixes applied; rejected ones not.
- [ ] Tokens-only; no test-hook changes; test:unit+lint+tsc green.
- [ ] Affected surfaces re-screenshotted.

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit`; re-shot PNGs confirm.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/globals.css", "components/ui", "components/DocumentView.tsx", "components/CommentSidebar.tsx", "components/SessionBanner.tsx", "components/VersionHistory.tsx", "components/WebhookManager.tsx", "components/TokenManager.tsx", "app/page.tsx", "app/login/page.tsx", "app/register/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all medium/low objective resolved", "approved subjective applied, rejected not", "tokens-only no test-hook changes", "unit/lint/tsc green", "affected surfaces re-shot"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Final verification + post-fix score
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove the whole suite green end-to-end, final screenshot pass, record post-fix 6-pillar score vs 17/24 baseline.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/superpowers/2026-06-10-quorum-ai-ui-review.md` (add `## Post-fix score` + delta)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] test:unit green (>= baseline count).
- [ ] test:e2e green (free port 3000 first).
- [ ] lint 0; tsc 0; build 0/0.
- [ ] No Settings nav button; test hooks intact (navigation/theme/presence/selections/suggestions specs pass).
- [ ] Doc has `## Post-fix score` + delta vs 17/24.

**Verify:** all five commands green; `grep -c 'Post-fix score' doc` → 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/2026-06-10-quorum-ai-ui-review.md"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit && pnpm lint && npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm build && (lsof -ti tcp:3000 | xargs -r kill -9; pnpm test:e2e)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["test:unit green >= baseline", "test:e2e green", "lint 0 + tsc 0 + build 0/0", "no Settings nav button; hooks intact", "doc has Post-fix score + delta"]}
```
